sub-7fb68f11361c-0f2cc045.task_title: Determinism Verification Task with Specific Requirements
sub-7fb68f11361c-0f2cc045.task_description:
Objective: Verify absolute determinism across iterations.
    Requirement: Same input must yield identical output every time.
    Constraint: Zero randomness, zero variance allowed.
    Technical Stack: FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker.

sub-304468318b9e-4cf182ab.task_description: This is a description that is at least ten characters long and has enough detail for validation checks.

sub-c8ded0272f25-eview-v1.task_description: Validate Parikshak using actual historical developer submissions and repositories. Verify deterministic outputs across repeated executions.

sub-f055e2cff916-rline-v1.task_description: Implement a sliding window rate limiter middleware for protected FastAPI routes using SQLite backend.

sub-bf7b3c9280fe-hakti-v1.task_description: Develop the GC Shakti consensus engine integration for governed TANTRA release pipelines. Implement cryptographic signature checks and replay prevention rules.

sub-416b2e6f1d07-t-03e408.task_description: Implement consensus state machine to verify blockchain block finality and replay checks.

sub-5caf4c3cf748-622ef3ed.task_description: Implement Gov-OS journal and Pravah replay adapters.

sub-251e5ba06e1b-89f4bb3a.task_description: This is a detailed description for the test task submission to debug the 500 error on review load endpoint.

sub-585b4cbfc7e3-2bd87ec6.task_title: Parikshak Deterministic Task Review and Governance System
sub-585b4cbfc7e3-2bd87ec6.task_description: Parikshak is a deterministic rule-based engineering task evaluation engine built with FastAPI and SQLite. The system implements a strict binary rule engine that evaluates task submissions against schema validation completeness checks logic correctness and integration verification. It features an immutable append-only event journal with cryptographic governance envelopes a human-in-loop review queue that blocks autonomous AI assignment releases and a single-writer concurrency mutex for serialized database mutations. The architecture includes a graph-based task traversal engine that routes PASS submissions to advancement tasks and FAIL submissions to corrective assignments.

improvement_hints: Provide more detailed task description (min 50 words).
